title: OpenAI launches ChatGPT
summary: OpenAI releases ChatGPT, a conversational model that kicks off the generative-AI demand cycle.

title: OpenAI releases GPT-4
summary: GPT-4 launches with multimodal input, intensifying enterprise AI compute demand.

title: NVIDIA reports blowout Q1 FY24 data-center revenue

title: DeepSeek R1 triggers an AI cost-efficiency reassessment
